preview.audioOnlyHint: No video. Only the microphone is streamed to the RTMP destination.
preview.permissionHint: Enable the camera and microphone in your browser to preview and broadcast.
preview.note: The browser publishes your camera and microphone over WebRTC to a LiveKit room; the server composes that room and forwards it to the RTMP destination. It's not a direct RTMP push from the browser.

form.title: Destination and devices
form.rtmpInvalid: Invalid format. It must start with rtmp:// or rtmps:// and include host and stream key.

actions.needValidUrl: Enter a valid RTMP URL to enable broadcasting.

errors.rtmpInvalid: Invalid RTMP URL. It must be rtmp://host/app/streamKey (full URL including the stream key).
errors.noToken: The server did not return a valid publish token.
errors.connLost: Connection to the room was lost.
errors.egressEnded: The broadcast ended on the server ({{status}}).
errors.micRequired: No microphone: {{detail}}. It is required in audio-only mode.
errors.stopUnconfirmed: Could not confirm the egress stop: {{detail}}.
